title: Australian Lamb Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic lamb biryani dish inspired by Australian cuisine, with a rich blend of spices and herbs.

ingredients.name: Australian lamb
ingredients.amount: 1 pound, boneless and cut into small pieces

ingredients.name: spices
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons, mixed (curry powder, cumin powder, coriander powder)

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onion and ginger; sauté until onion is translucent.
Add lamb; cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add spices, tomato paste, and biryani masala; cook for 1 minute.
Add water and bring to a boil.
Add rice and stir gently to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 20 minutes or until rice is cooked and fluffy.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
